title: Circle 'Exploring' Arc Network Token Launch, Proof-of-Stake Shift: CEO
snippet: Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire reiterated plans for its stablecoin-focused layer-1 blockchain to launch in mainnet “soon.”

title: Visa launches validator node on Tempo blockchain
snippet: Visa, Stripe, and Zodia Custody by Standard Chartered have become the first external validators to join the Tempo stablecoin payments blockchain.

title: Visa deepens blockchain push with Tempo validator node launch
snippet: The payments giant is operating a validator node on the Tempo blockchain, taking a direct role in transaction validation as it expands infrastructure for stablecoin settlement.

title: Paxos Labs raises $12 million, launches Amplify platform for onchain financial products
snippet: The round was led by Blockchain Capital, with participation from Robot Ventures, Arthur Hayes' family office Maelstrom, and Uniswap.

title: Paxos Labs to use $12M raise toward yield, lending, issuance tools
snippet: Backed by Blockchain Capital, the Amplify suite aims to enable platforms to generate yield and offer lending using customer-held digital assets.

title: Bank of Korea nominee backs central bank-led digital currency, sees limited role for stablecoins
Tether launches self-custodial wallet supporting USDT, bitcoin and tokenized gold
snippet: Tether has launched tether.wallet, a self-custodial crypto wallet supporting USDT, bitcoin, and tokenized gold.

title: Tether Introduces Digital Wallet to Promote Crypto Transactions
snippet: Tether, issuer of the world’s largest stablecoin, has introduced its first digital wallet. The tether.wallet is designed to bring the company’s infrastructure directly into the hands of its users, Tether said in a Tuesday (April 14) news release. title: Stablecoin Giant Tether Launches Wallet for USDT, Bitcoin and Gold-Backed Tokens
snippet: Tether’s self-custodial wallet aims to simplify crypto transactions with email-like identifiers, supporting stablecoins and Bitcoin alike.

title: Deutsche Börse invests in Kraken
snippet: Deutsche Börse has spent $200 million to buy a 1.5% fully diluted stake in crypto platform Kraken, deepening an existing strategic partnership between the two firms.

title: Stablecoin settlement: Why PSPs can’t afford to delay
snippet: How PSPs can push their stablecoin projects from pilot to launch.

title: Visa Joins Stripe's Tempo Payments Network as 'Anchor' Validator
snippet: Visa joins Stripe and Zodia Custody by Standard Chartered as the first external validators for the Stripe-backed Tempo blockchain.

title: Figure and Hastra widen DeFi credit offering with auto loan launch
snippet: Figure Technology is adding auto loans to Democratized Prime and extending Hastra beyond Solana, widening tokenized consumer credit access for DeFi investors.

title: Tether launches self-custodial wallet with cloud backup option
snippet: Tether launches tether.wallet, a self-custodial app supporting USDT, XAUT, USAT and Bitcoin with cloud-based key backup features.

title: Ethereum Foundation unveils $1M audit subsidy program to boost crypto security and cut costs for builders
Ethereum Foundation launches $1 million crypto security subsidy, providing access to over 20 audit firms
snippet: The EF tapped Areta's audit marketplace to provide access to over 20 security firms like Blocksec, Cetora, Hacken, Immunefi and Quantstamp.

title: US Justice Department opens compensation for victims of $4B OneCoin crypto fraud
snippet: OneCoin was launched by Ruja Ignatova and Karl Sebastian Greenwood in Bulgaria. Ignatova has been missing since 2017, and Greenwood was sentenced to 20 years in prison.

title: Visa and Zodia Custody join Stripe’s new blockchain for machine payments

snippet: Visa, Stripe and Zodia by Standard Chartered are notable early additions for Tempo as it begins to build out its validator set.

title: Bitcoin rebounds above $74,000 in ‘risk-on snapback’ despite persisting Middle East tensions
snippet: Crypto-related stocks closed higher on Monday, with Circle jumping 12%, Bullish rising 7.5%, and Coinbase gaining 3.9%.

title: Nauru taps Bitcoiner Dadvan Yousuf for trade role in digital asset push
snippet: Nauru moves from building rules to promoting its digital asset framework as it looks to attract companies and cross-border partnerships.

title: Senators Eye Draft Deal on Stablecoin Yield Amid Banking Lobby Pushback

title: White House economists say stablecoin yields are fine. Banks are having none of it

title: Sen. Tillis aims to release draft resolving Clarity Act’s stablecoin yield dispute this week: report
snippet: Banks have been strongly pushing back against allowing crypto firms to pay rewards on idle stablecoin balances.

title: Banks challenge White House report on stablecoin yields
snippet: The American Bankers Association is concerned that stablecoin yields would lead to mass deposit outflows from smaller community banks.
